project_type: Astro 5 static site with React islands, Tailwind v4, deployed on Cloudflare Pages
build_system: Astro (vite under the hood). npm scripts: dev, build, preview. prebuild runs scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs
test_framework: No test framework present. Verification is structural (TypeScript type-checking + build success) and manual browser testing on Cloudflare preview
build_command: npm run build (NOT available in this sandbox - no network)
test_command: No automated tests. Structural review + Astro build is the test.
verification_instructions: Since sandbox has no network (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY): 1) Verify TypeScript correctness by reading code 2) Verify all imports resolve to real files 3) Verify Tailwind classes use defined tokens 4) Verify no engine files (src/lib/*) are modified 5) Structural/semantic self-review. The user build-verifies PRs externally before merge.
setup_instructions: Cannot install/build in this sandbox. Work is purely code authoring and PR submission.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - NO npm install, NO npm run build, NO external package downloads. GitHub is accessible via Power tools for push/PR. User verifies builds externally. Do NOT modify engine files (src/lib/convert.ts, src/lib/convertImage.ts, src/lib/engines/*, scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs).
contribution_requirements: Push feature branches, open PRs to main. Small reviewable PRs. SACRED: never modify engine logic. Respect Atelier token system (extend, dont fork). WCAG AA contrast. Full keyboard accessibility. Responsive 320px-1440px+. prefers-reduced-motion support. Motto must remain prominent.

key_patterns.component_style: Astro (.astro) for static pages/layouts, React (.tsx) for interactive islands with client:load directive
key_patterns.styling: Tailwind v4 with custom @theme tokens in global.css. Classes reference tokens directly (bg-canvas, text-ink, border-mist, font-display). oklch color space.
key_patterns.state_management: React useState/useCallback hooks in islands. No external state library.
key_patterns.file_structure: src/pages/ for routes (including dynamic [from]-to-[to].astro), src/components/ for reusable pieces, src/lib/ for conversion engines (SACRED), src/data/ for content/config, src/layouts/ for page shells
key_patterns.dark_mode: data-theme='dark' attribute on html element, toggled by Header.astro script, persisted to localStorage. Tokens override in [data-theme='dark'] block in global.css
key_patterns.format_picker: FormatPicker.tsx uses native <select> elements - MUST be replaced with custom dropdown
key_patterns.converter_widget: Converter.tsx handles file input, drag/drop, conversion dispatch, progress, results. Has ambient glow div (MUST REMOVE). Results are minimal text rows (MUST upgrade to reward cards).
key_patterns.hub_pages: pdf.astro, image-converter.astro, audio-converter.astro, text.astro - all follow same structure: hero > FormatPicker > ToolGrid > ConversionGrid

directory_structure: src/pages/ (routes), src/components/ (UI), src/lib/ (engines - DO NOT TOUCH), src/data/ (content), src/styles/ (global.css with Atelier tokens), src/layouts/ (Layout.astro shell), public/ (static assets)
